{ "name": "league/flysystem-sftp-v3", "description": "SFTP filesystem adapter for Flysystem.", "keywords": ["flysystem", "filesystem", "sftp", "files", "file"], "autoload": { "psr-4": { "League\\Flysystem\\PhpseclibV3\\": "" } }, "require": { "php": "^8.0.2", "league/flysystem": "^3.0.14", "league/mime-type-detection": "^1.0.0", "phpseclib/phpseclib": "^3.0" }, "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Frank de Jonge", "email": "info@frankdejonge.nl" } ] }
